name: Integration - ServiceNow OAuth2 Authentication and Ticket Creation
description: Tests the integration between OAuth2Authenticator and ServiceNowAPIClient for creating a ticket, ensuring token retrieval and API call succeed.
input: Valid ticket data dictionary passed to ServiceNowAPIClient.create_ticket
output: TicketResponse with success=True and a valid ticket_id
success_criteria: OAuth2Authenticator.get_token is called and returns a valid token
